meaning: n.希伯来文的第一个字母
examples: Isaac! Have you remembered to meditate on Mt. Aleph daily?
ALEPH. Blessed [are] the undefiled in the way, who walk in the law of the LORD.
Everything that happened to me there in Buenos Aires I owe, in some way, to Aleph's death.
Three years later, he was ordained a rabbinic pastor by Aleph: Alliance for Jewish Renewal, which offers the designation for individuals who work in pastoral care.
